title: Cobalt Wireless
description: This mod adds a new ore called Cobalt, a couple of new items, and a new way to use redstone.
body:
# About this Mod.

This mod was made to add wireless redstone and a new ore that can be found in the overworld. Within the mod are a couple of other things, like a new sword and pickaxe that you can use.

You can access the wireless redstone mechanic within the mod by obtaining the new ore that the mod has added.

Smelting and crafting this ore into the new wrench and blocks that have been added will allow you to create and connect the wireless redstone blocks.

The wireless redstone mechanic works by you using the wrench on the new signal block and wireless block that has been added; after connecting these two blocks, you will be able to give the signal block a redstone input then the wireless block will provide a redstone output which will power any redstone it's connected to.

---

![Alt text](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/vboV7Pb7/images/44dc403185e049a7b882920317a3ffbb8ff9c83f.png)

---
(This mod is made for Forge.)

(Report any bugs or issues you find here: [Issue tracker](https://github.com/Voxla/cobalt_wireless/issues))
